title: Fresh overhaul in Suvendu Adhikari administration likely in near future, say officials
content: The transition towards a more stable administrative structure would follow the Election Commission’s unprecedented scale of pre-poll reshuffle across the State bureaucracy and police establishment, officials said

title: Regional, caste calculus in BJP’s West Bengal Cabinet choices
content: BJP gives Ministerial berths to representatives of the Matua, tribal, OBC, Rajbangshi, Brahmin, and Kayastha communities; there is one women in Suvendu Adhikari’s Council of Ministers

title: Assam: Himanta Biswa Sarma elected NDA leader, set to return as Chief Minister
content: Eight BJP legislators proposed the name of Mr. Sarma as its legislature party leader, Assam Central Observer J.P. Nadda said

title: Massive response to The Hindu EducationPlus Career Counselling Fair-2026 in Bengaluru
content: Higher Education Minister M.C. Sudhakar suggested that career counselling could begin early, at grade 8

title: Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam: a new political dawn in Tamil Nadu
content: It is not charisma or cine appeal alone that has gone in favour of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) and its founder C. Joseph Vijay in the 2026 Assembly election. For years now, several sections of the people had been tiring of the AIADMK and the DMK and wanted to move on. Pollsters were confounded by the havoc wreaked by the ‘Vijay tide’.

title: Vijay, the second debutant Legislator, to be sworn in as TN CM since 1967
content: Mr. Vijay is also the first member of a minority religious denomination (Christian) to occupy the top post in the State

title: NDA leaders to meet Assam Governor on May 10 over government formation
content: The meeting with the Governor in this regard is scheduled at the Lok Bhawan around 11:15 a.m., they said. “Matters about the formation of the new government will be discussed,” says an official

title: Masthan Rao Yadav seeks logistics corridor along Buckingham Canal in Andhra Pradesh
content: The Rajya Sabha MP wants a pilot project between Krishnapatnam and Ramayapatnam ports. Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal has asked him to wait for the IWAI’s hydrographic survey on National Waterway-4

title: Pawan Kalyan secures return of Annamayya woman Shehnaz stranded in Muscat
content: Shehnaz, a native of Valmikipuram in Annamayya district, landed at Hyderabad airport on Friday after the Deputy Chief Minister’s intervention with the Ministry of External Affairs and the Indian Embassy in Oman

title: TVK-led Tamil Nadu Government | Full list of Ministers
content: Here’s a full list of Ministers being inducted into the TVK-led new Tamil Nadu Government, with C. Joseph Vijay at its helm

title: Joseph Vijay sworn-in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister
content: As he commenced uttering “C. Joseph Vijay ennum naan…”, the crowd erupted in celebration, with whistle sounds filling the stadium with excitement and a sense of political arrival

title: Delhi on high alert over possible terror threat, security upped across key locations
content: According to sources, agencies have received alerts regarding possible attempts to target prominent offices and crowded areas in central Delhi using suicide attacks, vehicle-borne improvised explosive devices (IEDs), shootings and coordinated strikes

title: PM Modi congratulates TVK chief Vijay on taking oath as Tamil Nadu CM
content: TVK chief and its Legislature Party Leader Vijay was sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister on May 10, 2026

title: Muslim population in India may match that of Indonesia after Census: Kiren Rijiju
content: The Union Minister dismissed claims that minorities are under threat in the country, alleging that some political organisations are trying to create fear among the Muslims and Christians

title: Pawan Kalyan welcomes PM Modi on Telangana visit, thanks NDA government for ₹9,400-crore projects
content: The Andhra Pradesh Deputy Chief Minister and Jana Sena Party chief said the foundation-laying for projects worth ₹9,400 crore would strengthen infrastructure, connectivity and economic growth in Telangana

title: Prime Minister Narendra Modi attacks Congress on ‘betrayal of allies’
content: DMK was always working for the good of the Congress, and on several occasions, DMK has bailed Congress out of trouble,” the Prime Minister said

title: AP Waqf Board to conduct talent test for free intermediate education to 250 students
content: The Taleem-e-Hunar test, scheduled for May 17, will select students for free residential intermediate education with coaching for IIT-JEE, NEET and EAPCET. Girls have 33% reservation

title: EAM Jaishankar hands over India-assisted agro-processing facility in South Trinidad
content: S. Jaishankar arrived in Port of Spain from Paramaribo on May 8 on the concluding leg of his three-nation tour of Jamaica, Suriname, and Trinidad and Tobago, aimed at deepening India’s engagement with the Caribbean nations

title: Mizoram police bust racket using fake court papers to release prisoners
content: Two people, including an ambulance driver, were arrested for allegedly masterminding the operation to free 17 inmates from a district jail

title: Champaran challenger | Nishant Kumar begins political journey as JD(U) leader in Bihar
content: With the BJP installing its first Chief Minister in Bihar, the JD(U)’s previously reticent Nishant Kumar has taken on the political mantle from his father, Nitish Kumar, and accepted politics as a full-fledged profession for the survival of the party

title: News in Frames: A humble leaf that whispers home
content: A resilient food crop grown year-round across the Valley, the distinct Kashmiri collard green is more than just a vegetable; it is a cultural culinary experience that transcends social and economic boundaries

title: Off the script on Bengal elections
content: Polls come and go but close encounters with marginalised people stick with a reporter forever and their unanswered questions continue to echo

title: Aadhav Arjuna, ‘Bussy’ Anand, Sengottaiyan among 9 TVK Ministers to be sworn in with Vijay on May 10
content: As of now, there will be one representative each for women and Scheduled Castes (SC) in the Cabinet in Tamil Nadu.

title: What is the Governor’s role in a hung Assembly?
content: Why has Governor Rajendra Arlekar refused to swear in TVK party president Vijay as the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu? What is the primary objective of the Governor in such situations? What has the Supreme Court ruled in the past? Is the floor test the best way of proving majority?

title: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam | The star who stormed into politics
content: The political organisation built by actor-turned-politician Vijay, which emerged as the single largest party in the Assembly, declares itself as a secular movement, rooted in the Tamil experience, and committed to social justice and equality

title: Increase pace of works at Zaheerabad NIMZ: Sangareddy Collector
content: The NIMZ is proposed to be spread around 12,300 acres, of which around 7,000 acres were acquired. It is being established for heavy industries to set up large scale units

title: ‘Bussy’ N. Anand: Vijay’s close confidante to be part of new Tamil Nadu Cabinet
content: N. Anand, popularly known as ‘Bussy’ Anand, is the general secretary of the TVK and a trusted aide of its founder, C. Joseph Vijay

title: Could hantavirus be the new emerging pathogen in Kerala?
content: Presence of antibodies against the virus in blood samples was reported in the State in 1999 itself and one probable case of the virus-induced ‘hemorrhagic fever with renal syndrome’ was reported in 2014. Experts say a good number of ‘leptospirosis-like’ illnesses, wherein patients die within four to five days could be due to hantavirus or a co-infection of leptospirosis and hanta. Symptoms are similar and hard to distinguish without targeted serology tests

title: What is India’s first orbital data centre satellite?
content: What is an orbital data centre? Why are global firms interested? What does the Pixxel-Sarvam partnership involve?

title: Which party governs which State/UT: In maps
content: Results of Assembly elections across twelve States and two UTs since January 2024 has marked a shift in the political landscape. Here is a look at the change in ruling governments in maps.

title: Stalin urges new Tamil Nadu government to continue DMK regime’s schemes
content: He also welcomed alliance partners’ statements that they would continue to remain in the Secular Progressive Alliance (SPA) led by the DMK, even though they had extended support to

title: Three-hour meeting fails to end impasse over Congress Chief Minister for Kerala
content: Deepa Dasmunsi, party general secretary in charge of Kerala, told the media after the meeting that the high command had time until May 23 to finalise the candidate; senior leaders said party chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Lok Sabha LoP Rahul Gandhi were visibly dismayed by the poster wars and public marches

title: Tamil Nadu heading for a coalition government
content: Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha and Congress leader Rahul Gandhi will attend Mr. Vijay’s swearing-in ceremony, in which Congress candidate P. Viswanathan will also be sworn in as a Minister

title: ‘Awful experience’, Supriya Sule says after her car dashed by another vehicle on Expressway
content: The incident was a serious reminder that overspeeding and negligent driving can put lives at risk, Supriya Sule said

title: PM Modi to set the tone for capturing Telangana after West Bengal
content: Party leaders believe the Prime Minister’s visit marks the beginning of an “aggressive push” by the BJP to position Telangana as its next major electoral target in South India

title: India may not sign FTAs, to opt for deeper ties with customs unions in Africa, say officials
content: India’s cumulative investment in Africa has reached $80 billion, making it one of the major investors in the continent

title: Amit Shah hails BSY’s contribution to party’s growth in South India
content: At ‘BSY Abhimantosava’, organised to honour Yediyurappa, Union Home Minister says veteran leader should continue to guide party in Karnataka

title: Bitcoin scam: ED arrests hacker Sriki, two others
content: The ED arrested Sriki, Robin Khandeval and Sunish Hegde in connection with the alleged cryptocurrency scam. The trio was produced before a special ED court, and taken into custody for 10 days for further interrogation

title: Amid cabinet expansion buzz, U.P. CM Yogi meets Governor in Lucknow
content: The meeting is significant due to ongoing speculation about a cabinet expansion, the last of which was in March 2024

title: Punjab Congress to release ‘chargesheet’ against AAP government
content: Pointing out that the meeting deliberated on the dire state of affairs in Punjab, Bhupesh Baghel cites “corruption and lawlessness” ahead of the 2027 Assembly elections

title: CBI searches 17 locations in Reliance ADA Group cases
content: In recent months, the CBI has filed seven cases against Group entities based on complaints from various Public Sector Banks and LIC regarding alleged frauds involving thousands of crores

title: T.N. government formation highlights: TVK chief Vijay to be sworn in as Chief Minister on May 10
content: Aadhav Arjuna, ‘Bussy’ Anand, Sengottaiyan among 9 TVK Ministers to be sworn in; vote of confidence in Assembly by May 13

title: Amid Sultan Palace row, tourism minister says such heritage structures will be beautified
content: Bihar’s Tourism Minister Kedar Prasad Gupta says wherever there are "such old hotels (buildings) or heritage structures, we will beautify them all"

title: TVK president Vijay to be sworn in as Chief Minister on May 10; T.N. set for coalition government
content: TVK secures support of five Congress MLAs-elect, two each from CPI, CPI(M), VCK and IUML, taking the tally to 120

title: Water conservation a challenge in Ernakulam
content: Water availability in Kochi Corpn. slips into deficit from late November to early May, finds a study conducted as part of preparing a water budget

title:
Mortality of neem trees goes up in A.P.; 
scientists blame fungus, insect attack
content: Neem trees are dying due to dieback disease caused by infection by fungus Phomopsis Azadirachtae and Tea Mosquito Bug, says Dr. YSRHU Vice-Chancellor K Dhanumjaya Rao

title: Couple arrested for possession of gutka for illegal sale near Katpadi
content: When a special team conducting surprise checks approached the shop run by Mahalakshmi, she tried to escape from the spot

title: Ministers, ambassadors, artists to join The Hindu’s Huddle in June
content: This edition will discuss topics such as role of regional parties in strengthening India’s democracy, diplomacy in times of conflict, women’s representation in Parliament, and India and China’s role in shaping a new global order

title: From KA Sengottaiyan to S Keerthana - what Vijay's Tamil Nadu cabinet looks like
content: C Joseph Vijay has become the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu. He took the oath of office along with his cabinet members. This marks the formal assumption of power by the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam party. The party achieved a significant electoral victory on May 4. This win ended the long-standing dominance of traditional Dravidian parties.

title: Chaos in Australian cricket? 5 senior players say no to new contracts
content: Cricket Australia faces internal unrest following the failed BBL privatisation, impacting national contracts and player satisfaction. Senior players are reportedly hesitant to sign due to financial terms and a desire for overseas league flexibility, with concerns over pay disparity and lucrative international offers shifting priorities.

title: Accenture CEO says companies are investing in AI, but adoption challenges remain
content: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet highlights a growing gap in Corporate America's AI integration, noting increased investment but lagging operational adoption.  The company is restructuring its operating model and workforce strategy, even tying employee promotions to AI proficiency, to accelerate AI-driven transformation. This proactive approach mirrors past digital shifts but is being implemented at a faster pace.

title: Deepika delivers as India beat China to clinch Archery World Cup gold
content: India’s women’s recurve archery team won a dramatic gold medal at the Archery World Cup in Shanghai after defeating hosts China 5-4 in a shoot-off. Deepika Kumari, Ankita Bhakat and teenager Kumkum Mohod held their nerve after a tense final ended 4-4. India had earlier stunned South Korea in the semifinals, securing their first women’s recurve World Cup gold since 2021.

title: From Panchayat leader to senior minister: The political journey of KA Sengottaiyan
content: K.A. Sengottaiyan, a veteran politician with a five-decade career, has achieved a remarkable feat by becoming a 10-time legislator in Tamil Nadu. His journey began in grassroots politics in the 1970s, leading to significant roles, including School Education Minister. Following his expulsion from AIADMK, he joined the TVK party, further demonstrating his enduring political influence.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn; gives 540 workers $240m
content: A US-based businessman, Graham Walker, gifted his 540 employees a staggering $240 million from the $1.7 billion sale of his family's company, Fibrebond Corp. This generous act, where workers received an average of $443,000, stemmed from a condition Walker imposed before the sale to power-management giant Eaton.

title: Himanta Biswa Sarma set to return as Assam CM on May 12; PM Modi, Amit Shah to attend ceremony
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma has been unanimously re-elected as the BJP legislature party leader in Assam for a second term. Central observers JP Nadda and Nayab Singh Saini oversaw the meeting. Sarma is set to take oath as Chief Minister on Tuesday, with Prime Minister Narendra Modi attending as chief guest. The BJP-led NDA secured a decisive victory, winning 102 seats.

title: Happy Mother's day: Top 100 wishes, messages, images, GIFs and greetings card
content: This Mother's Day, move beyond generic greetings to honor the women who raised you with meaningful messages. The article offers categorized heartfelt, witty, and minimalist quotes, acknowledging the "mental load" and celebrating "mothers of choice."

title: Hardik Pandya: India's ‘Clutch God’ who disappears for Mumbai Indians
content: Hardik Pandya has excelled for India in crunch T20 situations since 2024 but struggled to replicate that impact for Mumbai Indians. His bowling economy and batting strike rate dip sharply for MI, especially in death overs. Questions resurfaced after MI’s record 103-run loss to CSK, where Hardik avoided bowling late despite having overs left, highlighting his contrasting performances for franchise and country.

title: Coinbase reports service issues, points finger at AWS cloud outage
content: A cooling issue at an Amazon Web Services data center in Northern Virginia caused widespread service disruptions. Cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase and derivatives giant CME Group were among the affected. AWS confirmed increased temperatures in a single data center impacted services. Efforts to restore cooling capacity led to extended outages for some customers. The primary issue is now resolved.

title: 'Congress misleading people by supporting govt in TN': PM Modi addresses rally in B'luru
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed a large gathering in Bengaluru, inaugurating and laying the foundation for projects worth Rs 9,500 crore. He highlighted recent electoral victories in Puducherry, Assam, and Bengal, alongside Gujarat's local election success, as historic milestones. The visit also includes dedicating Sindhu Hospital to the nation.

title: 'Will continue to work with Tamil Nadu government': PM Modi congratulates Vijay on forming govt
content: C. Joseph Vijay was sworn in as the new Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu on Sunday, marking a significant political shift. Prime Minister Narendra Modi congratulated Vijay and assured continued central government support for the state's welfare. Vijay's party, TVK, secured victory in the 2026 elections, ending the dominance of Dravidian parties.

title: TVK ends DMK-AIADMK era, actor-politician Vijay sworn in as Tamil Nadu chief minister
content: C Joseph Vijay was sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister after his party, TVK, emerged as the single largest in the assembly. Vijay secured the required majority with support from Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi and Indian Union Muslim League, unseating traditional Dravidian parties. He will seek a vote of confidence by May 13.

title: ‘I am not an angel …’: What Tamil Nadu CM Vijay said in his 1st address
content: C Joseph Vijay has been sworn in as Tamil Nadu Chief Minister, promising immediate welfare measures like free electricity up to 200 units. He emphasized performance, transparency, and a singular center of power, vowing to tackle fiscal mismanagement and drug abuse. Vijay also highlighted education, transport, and women's safety as key priorities, marking a new era of social justice.

title: West Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari picks ex-EC observer as his adviser
content: In a notable move, the Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari has welcomed the expertise of retired IAS officer Subrata Gupta as an adviser, shortly after Gupta wrapped up his role as a special observer for the recent assembly elections. Additionally, Shantanu Bala has been entrusted with the position of CM's private secretary.

title: ‘Missiles, drones locked on US targets’: Iran warns of ‘heavy assault’ after tanker strikes in Gulf of Oman
content: Iran's IRGC has warned of a "heavy assault" on US military assets and ships if Iranian oil tankers or commercial vessels are attacked in the Strait of Hormuz. This follows US forces disabling two Iranian oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman and an earlier exchange of fire near the strait.

title: Virat Kohli poised for history against MI, set to become first batter to...
content: Virat Kohli is on the cusp of another IPL record, needing just 28 runs against Mumbai Indians to become the first batter to score 1,000 IPL runs against them. This achievement would mark the fifth team he has surpassed this milestone against in his illustrious IPL career.

title: 'When I was ill, she would beat me': Nanny alleges assault at IIM-Bangalore professor’s home
content: A 23-year-old nanny from Manipur has accused her employer's wife of illegal confinement, assault, and starvation at their IIM-Bangalore campus residence. The woman claims the abuse began in 2021, culminating in her being locked inside the house and denied food. Neighbours provided assistance, leading to a police case under relevant sections of the BNS.

title: Karnataka minister D Sudhakar passes away at 66 following prolonged illness
content: Karnataka's Planning and Statistics Minister, D. Sudhakar, a senior Congress leader and MLA from Hiriyur, passed away early Sunday at 66 after a prolonged lung infection.  His demise, confirmed by the Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences, has deeply saddened Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar, who lauded Sudhakar's exemplary public service as a cabinet colleague and legislator.

title: IPL Playoff Probabilities: GT’s win lifts odds to 72.52%; RR still at 80.31%
content: Gujarat Titans surged to second place with a dominant 77-run victory over Rajasthan Royals, significantly boosting their playoff chances to 72.52%. Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan starred with the bat, while Rashid Khan impressed with the ball. Despite the loss, Rajasthan Royals maintain a higher overall playoff probability due to their easier remaining schedule.

title: SUV grazes MP Supriya Sule's car on Mumbai-Pune Expressway, all escape unhurt
content: NCP (SP) MP Supriya Sule's car was grazed by an SUV on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway near the Madap tunnel due to reckless driving. While Sule and her companions escaped unhurt, the Khalapur police have registered an FIR against the SUV driver for rash and negligent driving.

title: Woman found tied, gagged and murdered inside locked house
content: A woman living alone in Mauganj district was found murdered inside her locked house, with her hands and legs tied and cloth stuffed in her mouth. Post-mortem confirmed death by suffocation. Police are investigating multiple angles, including robbery and personal rivalry, and are analyzing technical data.

title: Congress hunts for consensus as camps flex muscle in CM battle: What’s happening Kerala
content: Congress is deliberating on its Kerala chief minister choice, with V.D. Satheesan, Ramesh Chennithala, and K.C. Venugopal as top contenders.  Meetings with the high command are ongoing, with a decision expected imminently.  The party is also addressing internal indiscipline following public demonstrations supporting individual leaders.

title: Vijay cabinet list: Home and public admin for TVK chief; PWD for KA Sengottaiyan
content: TVK leader Vijay is set to take charge of Home and Public Administration portfolios. Key party members are slated for significant roles, including Public Works, Municipal Administration, and Prohibition Enforcement. Other trusted aides are expected to handle Electricity and Commercial Taxes. Congress is likely to secure two ministerial positions, with a junior minister post also considered.

title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship to arrive in Tenerife today; WHO chief reaches Spanish island
content: Passengers from the hantavirus-affected MV Hondius will disembark in Tenerife on Sunday. Three passengers have died, and five others tested positive after leaving the ship. The Andes virus strain, which can spread person-to-person, was detected. Spanish authorities confirmed the deceased and their belongings will not be unloaded.

title: Strait trouble: Global oil tanks run dry at unprecedented pace as Hormuz remains choked
content: Global oil inventories are rapidly depleting due to the Iran war disrupting crude flows from the Persian Gulf, leading to concerns of price spikes and shortages.  Asia faces immediate pressure, with some nations potentially experiencing shortages within a month as reserves hit multi-year lows.  Strategic reserves are being deployed, but this further weakens the global safety buffer.

title: 'Khamma Ghani': Gill, Rashid tease Rajasthan with witty social media post
content: Gujarat Titans crushed Rajasthan Royals by 77 runs after posting 229/4, powered by Shubman Gill’s 84 and Sai Sudharsan’s 55. Rashid Khan starred with 4/33 as Rajasthan collapsed for 152 despite a quickfire 36 from teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Gill later mocked Rajasthan online, posting: “Pink city, blue result. Khamma Ghani.”

title: Miami boat explosion: At least 15 injured near Haulover Sandbar - what we know so far
content: A boat explosion near Miami's Haulover Sandbar on Saturday afternoon sent at least 11 people to hospitals. Emergency crews responded to the "possible vessel explosion" in Biscayne Bay, a popular party spot. A charter boat was involved, with preliminary information suggesting a potential gas leak. A large-scale rescue operation was launched, and an investigation into the cause is ongoing.

title: Over 70 killed in attacks in Mali; Al-Qaeda linked JNIM claims responsibility
content: Central Mali is reeling from a brutal wave of jihadist attacks, with at least 70 lives lost in recent days. The Al-Qaeda-linked JNIM has claimed responsibility for the coordinated assaults, which targeted villages that resisted their control. This escalating violence follows earlier deadly incidents and a prison raid, highlighting the persistent threat in the region.

title: Trespasser killed after being hit by plane during takeoff at Denver airport; 17 injured
content: A trespasser was killed after being struck by a Frontier Airlines flight during takeoff at Denver International Airport. The individual had breached security by jumping the perimeter fence and running onto the runway. Seventeen people were injured in the incident, with the pilot stopping takeoff procedures immediately.

title: TVK's Vijay to take oath as Tamil Nadu CM today at 10am; trust vote by May 13
content: C Joseph Vijay will be sworn in as Tamil Nadu's Chief Minister on Sunday at 10 am. He secured the required majority with support from Congress, CPI, CPM, VCK, and IUML. The governor has directed Vijay to seek a vote of confidence in the assembly by May 13.

title: Jadeja's cheeky 'player in pocket' send-off to Buttler goes viral - Watch
content: Ravindra Jadeja unveiled a novel "player in pocket" celebration after dismissing Jos Buttler during the Gujarat Titans vs. Rajasthan Royals IPL 2026 match. This fresh gesture added a new dimension to his iconic on-field expressions, following a crucial wicket taken by Donovan Ferreira.

title: Congress struggles in Kerala for consensus as CM hopefuls push claims
content: Congress leaders Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi are deliberating on the next Chief Minister of Kerala. V D Satheesan, K C Venugopal, and Ramesh Chennithala are the key contenders. The party is also addressing factional protests. A decision is expected soon after consulting with party legislators and allies. The leadership aims for consensus to avoid internal discord.

title: I'm CM for all, says Suvendu Adhikari, shuts up 'Jai Shri Ram' chant
content: In his inaugural address, Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari called on his supporters at Jorasanko Thakurbari to move away from partisan slogans like 'Jai Shri Ram,' stating that his leadership embodies the spirit of every citizen in Bengal. He emphasized the urgent need to repair and rejuvenate the state's educational and cultural landscape, drawing inspiration from Rabindranath Tagore’s vision.

title: Rajasthan Royals equal all-time unwanted IPL record vs Gujarat Titans
content: Rajasthan Royals have equalled an IPL record by conceding seven totals of over 200 runs in a single season. This worrying bowling trend follows a strong start to IPL 2026. Gujarat Titans posted 229/4 against them in Jaipur. Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan starred for GT. This puts immense pressure on Rajasthan's batting.

title: 'Still haven’t played a perfect match'- Shubman Gill’s warning to other teams
content: Shubman Gill, leading Gujarat Titans to a commanding win, expressed satisfaction with their dominant performance while still seeking a 'perfect match'.  Despite a strong batting display and a comfortable victory, Gill highlighted areas for improvement, emphasizing aggressive bowling and crucial partnerships. He also confirmed a minor ankle scare during the innings, as the team continues its winning streak.

title: Test of advanced Agni missile with multiple warheads technology a success: Defence ministry
content: India successfully conducted a flight-trial of an advanced Agni missile equipped with a Multiple Independently Targeted Re-entry Vehicle (MIRV) system. This demonstration showcased the nation's capability to strike multiple strategic targets with a single missile, significantly enhancing defence preparedness against growing threats.

title: Census effect: Cities will see ‘less crime’ next year
content: Crime rates in Indian cities are set to show a decline in 2027 due to a mathematical glitch in National Crime Records Bureau (NCRB) calculations. NCRB uses outdated Census population figures as denominators, causing crime rates to appear inflated until the next Census updates these numbers, leading to dramatic drops.

title: Mike Vrabel’s Patriots future clearer amid Dianna Russini drama
content: Mike Vrabel remains secure as head coach of the New England Patriots despite growing controversy surrounding his alleged affair with Dianna Russini. NFL insider Albert Breer claimed the organization is focused on protecting Vrabel and the team’s image. However, he warned the situation could change if more allegations or relationships emerge. The controversy has also sparked reports of tension in Vrabel’s marriage with Jen Vrabel.

title: Former NFL scout links Dianna Russini to Bill Belichick, Sean Payton
content: The Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini controversy intensified after a former NFL scout alleged that the veteran insider had relationships with several prominent NFL figures, including Bill Belichick and Sean Payton. The claims spread rapidly online following renewed attention from TMZ reports and viral social media discussions. Sports analyst Jason Whitlock also mocked the scandal publicly, calling it “The Love Bloat.” Despite the growing controversy, Patriots players reportedly continue supporting Vrabel ahead of the upcoming season.

title: At Vijay's Oath, Vande Mataram Plays In Full Followed By Jana Gana Mana
content: At Vijay's oath ceremony, 'Vande Mataram' was sung in full, followed by the national anthem 'Jana Gana Mana' and the state song 'Tamil Thai Vazhthu'.

title: Supriya Sule Safe After Car Hits Her Vehicle On Mumbai-Pune Expressway
content: "While travelling from Pune to Mumbai today I had an awful experience on the highway when vehicle GJ13CF5257 rammed into my car from the side due to reckless driving," she wrote on X.

title: Thieves Steal Tyres, Rims From Several Cars In Gurugram, Locals Question Cops
content: The theft occurred on Friday night, and vehicle owners discovered their cars resting on bricks without tyres when they woke up on Saturday morning.

title: "There Is Only 1 Power Centre": Top Quotes From Vijay's First Speech
content: Vijay took the oath as the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu after four days of political twists and turns. Along with him, 9 TVK  leaders also sworn in.

title: 'Thalapathy' Is Tamil Nadu Chief Minister. Vijay Takes Oath With 9 TVK Leaders
content: Vijay was sworn in at a fully packed Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium in Chennai, with his family members and senior politicians in attendance.

title: Iran Congratulates Karoline Leavitt On Child's Birth, With A 'Minab' Reminder
content: Earlier in March, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the United States does not target civilians.

title: Vijay Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: "I'm Like Your Son, Your Brother," Vijay Tells Supporters After Taking Oath
content: Vijay Oath Ceremony LIVE Updates: Vijay, the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief, now has the support of 120 MLAs.

title: The Four Days Of Political Drama That Made Vijay Tamil Nadu Chief Minister
content: The first breakthrough came from the Congress, a long-time DMK ally that had earlier held informal discussions with TVK ahead of the elections but ultimately chose not to join the alliance

title: Meet The 9 TVK Leaders Who Took Oath Alongside Vijay
content: New Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay would have an initial team of 10 ministers in the new state cabinet

title: "Vile": Chief Justice Slams Casteist Remark Attributed To Him On Social Media
content: He was referring to certain posts currently in wide circulation on social media platforms, and specifically mentioned an account by the name @UnreservedMERIT on X.

title: Allahabad High Court Criticises UP Police Over Security Of Citizens
content: A division bench comprising Justice JJ Munir and Justice Tarun Saxena said the sensitivity of the law-and-order agencies to protect human life has "always been low and continues to be so"

title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: 9 Dead As Israel Strikes Lebanon Despite Truce
content: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

title: Karnataka Minister D Sudhakar Dies At 66 After Prolonged Illness
content: Four-time MLA Sudhakar initially got admitted to the Manipal Hospital in Bengaluru for knee surgery. After the surgery, he developed an infection in his lungs, which turned serious.

title: Israel Built And Defended A Secret Base In Iraq For Iran War: Report

content: Three people have been detained in connection with the killing and are being questioned, police said, adding that no arrests have been made so far.
